title: Remove Sanskrit — keep only Urdu in languages/subjects

requirements.text: Find every place on the site where languages or subjects are listed and remove 'Sanskrit' entirely, leaving only 'Urdu' (and any other subjects that are not Sanskrit). This applies to all pages and components including AcademicsPage, FacultyPage, AboutPage, HomePage, and any other page or component that mentions Sanskrit.

quotes: you have written sanskrit and urdu so edit and just write urdu

acceptanceCriteria: The word 'Sanskrit' does not appear anywhere on the site — in subject lists, language lists, curriculum sections, or any other context.
Urdu remains listed wherever it was previously shown alongside Sanskrit.
All other subjects and languages that were listed (apart from Sanskrit) are unchanged.
Changes are applied across all pages and components: AcademicsPage, FacultyPage, AboutPage, HomePage, and any other file that referenced Sanskrit.

constraints: Do not remove Urdu from any list — only Sanskrit should be removed.
Do not alter any other subject, language, or curriculum content beyond removing Sanskrit.
nonGoals: Adding new subjects or languages not already present on the site.
Redesigning the academics or curriculum sections.
